message:
Restore edition 2024 and simplify sysinfo dependency

Restores workspace.package.edition to "2024" after temporary downgrade
and simplifies sysinfo dependency configuration.

Changes
-------
**Root Cargo.toml**
- edition: "2021" → "2024"
  Rust edition 2024 provides async fn in traits, refined pattern matching,
  and improved type inference. With nightly toolchain, this is appropriate.

- sysinfo: removed explicit features [system, process]
  Default features are sufficient for scheduler load sampling needs.

**ultrasearch/Cargo.toml**
- edition: "2021" → "2024"
  Align nested marker file with root workspace edition.

Rationale
---------
The edition 2024 → 2021 downgrade was introduced cautiously in commit
2d12e83 to avoid potential compatibility issues. However, since we're
already committed to nightly Rust (per AGENTS.md policy update), we can
safely use edition 2024 throughout.

Related
-------
- §c00.1.2 manifest cleanup (awaiting in multi-agent plan)
- rust-toolchain.toml: channel = "nightly"
- AGENTS.md: nightly + wildcard policy

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

+# Workspace is defined at repository root (../Cargo.toml). This file exists to
+# avoid nested workspace confusion; do not add members here.
 members = []
